what_it_does: Defines an HTML page that mounts a live-composed unit view for "The Distill Pipeline" by creating a corpus record, adding authored display metadata, rendering it through DNA runtime helpers, binding Vee interaction, and appending the result to #mount.
observations: Loads Google fonts, shared piece and phone CSS, and clears body padding inline.
Creates a single #mount container for the rendered unit screen.
Defines REC as a capture record for recollection round 1 pilot with a digest, kind, projection, and code source address.
Calls DNA.unitFromCorpus with title, line, card copy, six neighbours, and three stats.
Calls DNA.renderUnit, DNA.bindVee, then appends the rendered screen to the mount node.
Inline comments describe the piece as live-composed and gallery-driven through DNA.injectVars, though this file does not call DNA.injectVars.
standouts: Combines corpus-like source metadata with authored presentation text in the page script.
Represents the unit as a hub with neighbour roles, labels, scores, and addresses.
Keeps the visible page body minimal and delegates the interface to runtime rendering.
conventions: Uses external runtime scripts before inline composition code.
Uses a const REC fixture and a derived unit object before rendering.
Uses compact inline data objects for neighbours and stats.
Breaks static-markup convention by rendering the primary UI entirely from JavaScript.
concerns: Depends on global DNA runtime APIs without local guards.
Contains an absolute local source_address path in the embedded record.
Neighbour scores are present without file-local explanation of their scale or display semantics.
notes: This file is a self-contained gallery page that demonstrates one rendered knowledge unit and its neighbour constellation through the DNA unit runtime.
questions: What does tapping a socket fire in this context?
How is the warmth dial injected by the gallery if this file does not call DNA.injectVars?
Are neighbour scores display-only metadata or used by DNA.renderUnit?
Should the absolute source_address be preserved in distributable gallery output?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the file: it composes a real-looking unit record with neighbour data and renders it through DNA.renderUnit with Vee interaction binding.
intention_signals: It seems intended to show how a code-derived knowledge unit can be presented as an interactive, authored unit face while retaining source, neighbour, and stat metadata.
novelty: The page treats an HTML gallery piece as a live composition of corpus data, editorial copy, neighbour topology, and interaction binding rather than as static markup.
contribution: Contributes a file-local pattern for turning a captured code digest into an interactive unit face with authored framing, neighbour relationships, stats, and runtime-mounted presentation.
summary_for_embedding: An HTML gallery piece that renders a "The Distill Pipeline" knowledge unit from an embedded corpus record, neighbour list, stats, and DNA runtime calls.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for demonstrating a live-composed unit face where source-derived knowledge and authored interface copy become an interactive constellation view.
